Rouse Check 1d10
Roll when spending Blood. On a 6–10 no Hunger is gained. On a 1–5 your Hunger rises by 1.

Remorse Check —d10
Roll at end of session when you have Stains. Pool equals unfilled Humanity dots. Any 6–10 clears all Stains. No success costs 1 Humanity.
